code:
import { theme } from "../styles/theme";
export const AGENTS = [{
  id: "sales",
  icon: "💼",
  name: "Sales Agent",
  color: theme.accent,
  tagline: "Closes deals while you sleep",
  description: "Qualifies leads, writes personalized pitches, handles objections, and drafts contracts — fully autonomous.",
  system: "You are a professional sales AI. Your job is to qualify leads, handle objections, write personalized pitches, and close deals. Be confident, persuasive, and results-driven. Keep responses concise and actionable.",
  prompts: ["Write a cold email for a SaaS company selling to HR directors", "Handle this objection: 'Your price is too high, we can't afford it'", "Qualify this lead: Marketing agency, 50 employees, $2M revenue", "Write a 5-step follow-up sequence for a ghosted prospect"]
}, {
  id: "support",
  icon: "🎧",
  name: "Support Agent",
  color: theme.accent2,
  tagline: "Resolves tickets at machine speed",
  description: "Handles customer queries, writes refund policies, creates help docs, and escalates only what truly needs humans.",
  systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Customer Support Agent for NexusAI. Resolve customer issues with empathy and precision.`,
  prompts: ["Customer says: 'I was charged twice this month, I want a refund immediately'", "Write a help article: How to connect Stripe to NexusAI", "Customer angry: 'Your software deleted all my data!' — respond", "Write an auto-reply for when support is offline"]
}, {
  id: "marketing",
  icon: "📣",
  name: "Marketing Agent",
  color: theme.accent3,
  tagline: "Campaigns that print money",
  description: "Generates ad copy, email campaigns, social content, SEO articles, and full marketing strategies on demand.",
  systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Marketing Agent for NexusAI. Create high-converting marketing content and strategies.`,
  prompts: ["Write 3 Facebook ad variations for a $299/mo automation SaaS", "Create a 7-email welcome sequence for new trial users", "Write an SEO blog post outline: 'How to automate your sales process'", "Generate 10 LinkedIn post ideas for a B2B SaaS founder"]
}, {
  id: "operations",
  icon: "⚙️",
  name: "Operations Agent",
  color: theme.accent4,
  tagline: "Optimizes every process automatically",
  description: "Maps workflows, identifies bottlenecks, writes SOPs, and designs automation blueprints.",
  systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Operations Agent for NexusAI. Optimize business processes and design automation workflows.`,
  prompts: ["Map and automate our employee onboarding process", "Design an automation workflow for invoice processing", "Identify bottlenecks in lead to close process", "Write an SOP for handling refund requests"]
}, {
  id: "analyst",
  icon: "📊",
  name: "Analytics Agent",
  color: theme.accent5,
  tagline: "Turns data into decisions",
  description: "Interprets business metrics, spots trends, forecasts revenue, and delivers executive-grade insights instantly.",
  systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Business Analytics Agent for NexusAI. Transform raw business data into strategic insights.`,
  prompts: ["Analyze: MRR $45K, churn 8%, CAC $320, LTV $1,200", "Our sales conversion is 2.3%. Industry avg is 5.1%", "Forecast next 12 months: currently $80K MRR growing 12% monthly", "We spend $15K/mo on marketing, get 200 leads, close 8"]
}, {
  id: "finance",
  icon: "💰",
  name: "Finance Agent",
  color: theme.accent6,
  tagline: "CFO-level intelligence",
  description: "Writes financial reports, cash flow projections, pricing strategies, investor memos, and budget optimizations.",
  systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Finance Agent for NexusAI. Provide CFO-level financial intelligence and strategy.`,
  prompts: ["Write a 12-month cash flow projection for a SaaS at $50K MRR", "We're burning $80K/month with $400K runway", "Build a pricing strategy for a B2B tool", "Write an investor update memo for Q2 results"]
}, {
  id: "chatbot",
  icon: "💬",
  name: "ChatBot Agent",
  color: theme.accent7,
  tagline: "24/7 replies across all platforms",
  description: "Automatically responds to customers on Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Twitter, LinkedIn, and your website. Handles FAQs, collects leads, books appointments.",
  systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI ChatBot Agent for NexusAI. Handle customer conversations across all social media platforms and websites.`,
  prompts: ["Customer on Instagram: 'What are your hours and do you offer refunds?'", "Facebook lead: 'I'm interested in your Pro plan, can you call me?'", "WhatsApp: 'My order hasn't arrived in 7 days'", "Website chat: 'How do I cancel my subscription?'"]
}];

sourcesContent:
import { theme } from "../styles/theme";

export const AGENTS = [
  {
    id: "sales",
    icon: "💼",
    name: "Sales Agent",
    color: theme.accent,
    tagline: "Closes deals while you sleep",
    description: "Qualifies leads, writes personalized pitches, handles objections, and drafts contracts — fully autonomous.",
    system: "You are a professional sales AI. Your job is to qualify leads, handle objections, write personalized pitches, and close deals. Be confident, persuasive, and results-driven. Keep responses concise and actionable.",
    prompts: [
      "Write a cold email for a SaaS company selling to HR directors",
      "Handle this objection: 'Your price is too high, we can't afford it'",
      "Qualify this lead: Marketing agency, 50 employees, $2M revenue",
      "Write a 5-step follow-up sequence for a ghosted prospect",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "support",
    icon: "🎧",
    name: "Support Agent",
    color: theme.accent2,
    tagline: "Resolves tickets at machine speed",
    description: "Handles customer queries, writes refund policies, creates help docs, and escalates only what truly needs humans.",
    systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Customer Support Agent for NexusAI. Resolve customer issues with empathy and precision.`,
    prompts: [
      "Customer says: 'I was charged twice this month, I want a refund immediately'",
      "Write a help article: How to connect Stripe to NexusAI",
      "Customer angry: 'Your software deleted all my data!' — respond",
      "Write an auto-reply for when support is offline",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "marketing",
    icon: "📣",
    name: "Marketing Agent",
    color: theme.accent3,
    tagline: "Campaigns that print money",
    description: "Generates ad copy, email campaigns, social content, SEO articles, and full marketing strategies on demand.",
    systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Marketing Agent for NexusAI. Create high-converting marketing content and strategies.`,
    prompts: [
      "Write 3 Facebook ad variations for a $299/mo automation SaaS",
      "Create a 7-email welcome sequence for new trial users",
      "Write an SEO blog post outline: 'How to automate your sales process'",
      "Generate 10 LinkedIn post ideas for a B2B SaaS founder",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "operations",
    icon: "⚙️",
    name: "Operations Agent",
    color: theme.accent4,
    tagline: "Optimizes every process automatically",
    description: "Maps workflows, identifies bottlenecks, writes SOPs, and designs automation blueprints.",
    systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Operations Agent for NexusAI. Optimize business processes and design automation workflows.`,
    prompts: [
      "Map and automate our employee onboarding process",
      "Design an automation workflow for invoice processing",
      "Identify bottlenecks in lead to close process",
      "Write an SOP for handling refund requests",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "analyst",
    icon: "📊",
    name: "Analytics Agent",
    color: theme.accent5,
    tagline: "Turns data into decisions",
    description: "Interprets business metrics, spots trends, forecasts revenue, and delivers executive-grade insights instantly.",
    systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Business Analytics Agent for NexusAI. Transform raw business data into strategic insights.`,
    prompts: [
      "Analyze: MRR $45K, churn 8%, CAC $320, LTV $1,200",
      "Our sales conversion is 2.3%. Industry avg is 5.1%",
      "Forecast next 12 months: currently $80K MRR growing 12% monthly",
      "We spend $15K/mo on marketing, get 200 leads, close 8",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "finance",
    icon: "💰",
    name: "Finance Agent",
    color: theme.accent6,
    tagline: "CFO-level intelligence",
    description: "Writes financial reports, cash flow projections, pricing strategies, investor memos, and budget optimizations.",
    systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI Finance Agent for NexusAI. Provide CFO-level financial intelligence and strategy.`,
    prompts: [
      "Write a 12-month cash flow projection for a SaaS at $50K MRR",
      "We're burning $80K/month with $400K runway",
      "Build a pricing strategy for a B2B tool",
      "Write an investor update memo for Q2 results",
    ],
  },
  {
    id: "chatbot",
    icon: "💬",
    name: "ChatBot Agent",
    color: theme.accent7,
    tagline: "24/7 replies across all platforms",
    description: "Automatically responds to customers on Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Twitter, LinkedIn, and your website. Handles FAQs, collects leads, books appointments.",
    systemPrompt: `You are an elite AI ChatBot Agent for NexusAI. Handle customer conversations across all social media platforms and websites.`,
    prompts: [
      "Customer on Instagram: 'What are your hours and do you offer refunds?'",
      "Facebook lead: 'I'm interested in your Pro plan, can you call me?'",
      "WhatsApp: 'My order hasn't arrived in 7 days'",
      "Website chat: 'How do I cancel my subscription?'",
    ],
  },
];
